items.hook: 这类家政很多时候不是不会约，而是怕这次范围没说清。
items.bridge: 上门保洁里真正决定下一步的，通常是房型、重点区域和时间窗口。
items.next_step: Ask for room type, key areas, and preferred time.
items.handoff_suggestion: If clear facts arrive, move to Catcher.

items.hook: 这种情况先把时间和范围锁住，会比先看一堆套餐更省心。
items.bridge: 节前、入住和退租场景通常还会牵涉加项和排班，所以先收窄范围更重要。
items.next_step: Ask for date, room size, and the main cleaning priority.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route deadline cases toward Catcher then Dispatcher.

items.hook: 先把最担心的点讲清楚，比急着比价格更有帮助。
items.bridge: 很多阿姨稳定性、工具和赔付问题，只有把房型和主要顾虑说出来，才能回答得更稳。
items.next_step: Ask what the main concern is and what kind of home situation this is.
items.handoff_suggestion: Trust-sensitive cases should carry a risk tag.

items.hook: 这种情况先判断排不排得上，比先看一堆价格更关键。
items.bridge: 周末急约通常要先锁时间、房型和是否愿意先做重点区域。
items.next_step: Ask which time, what room type, and whether a narrower scope would work.

items.hook: 补做这件事很多时候不是重新选，而是先把这次要补哪一类说清。
items.bridge: 周期保洁更看重频率、阿姨偏好和时间。
items.next_step: Ask whether this is a renewal, the usual route, and the timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Cycle cases can route to Catcher or Followup.

items.hook: 第一次约家政先把房型和时间说清，反而更容易轻松一点。
items.bridge: 不用一上来就决定做哪一套，先把房型、重点区域和想约时间收窄就够了。
items.next_step: Ask for room type, key area, and preferred visit time.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher when basics are complete.
